items.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug news and Bitcoin drop to sub-$60K: Is $1.4K next?
items.summary: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

items.title: ZEC drops 30% as Shielded Labs reveals more about infinite counterfeit bug
items.summary: ZEC market capitalization fell by almost $3 billion over the past 24 hours following the disclosure of a critical vulnerability, despite it being patched already.

items.title: Memecoins dogecoin, shiba inu dive 9% as bitcoin nears $60,000
items.summary: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu led losses among major tokens as heavy volume and liquidations overwhelmed support levels, extending a broader risk-off move across crypto markets.

items.title: Alsobrooks says Clarity Act needs ethics deal before Senate vote
items.summary: The Maryland Democrat says bipartisan crypto legislation is close, but ethics and illicit finance concerns remain unresolved.

items.title: Bitcoin back above $61,000 after rout leads to $1.6 billion liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin fell as low as $59,227 overnight before recovering, steadying after Friday's strong jobs report set off a selloff that sank the Nasdaq 100 about 5% and rattled stocks, bonds and crypto together.

items.title: Cardano social activity surges as ADA falls under 20 cents to four-year lows
items.summary: Santiment data show active addresses at a four-month high and social dominance near a 2026 peak after Charles Hoskinson warned of a "wave of failures" in the ecosystem.

items.title: Why diehard bitcoin purists aren’t sweating the massive price crash that wiped out $200 billion
items.summary: Mati Greenspan, Michael Saylor and Jameson Lopp blamed the AI boom for draining capital from bitcoin. Meanwhile, Jack Mallers refrained from sharing an outlook but recommended buying the dip.

items.title: AI exposed a massive flaw in top crypto network and experts warn banks could be next
items.summary: After an AI model helped uncover a four-year-old flaw in Zcash, security researchers warn that similar bugs may be hiding across crypto and traditional financial systems.

items.title: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize clears key hurdle to go public on NYSE
items.summary: The tokenization specialist behind BlackRock's BUIDL fund could begin trading on the NYSE as SEC approves merger registration.

items.title: U.S. House tax committee weighs crypto bills, including relief for small transactions
items.summary: Seven draft bills are being circulated by the House Ways and Means Committee ahead of a hearing next week, including proposals to ease small-gain, mining and staking burdens.

items.title: Bitcoin loses $60,000, falls to weakest price since October 2024
items.summary: Several headwinds converged over bitcoin recently as its largest buyer turned seller, ETF investors headed for the exits, and rate-hike fears rose.

items.title: XRP falls toward $1.10 as liquidation-driven selloff pushes token to multi-month lows
items.summary: XRP lost another 5% after a high-volume breakdown overwhelmed support near $1.20, leaving traders focused on whether the latest washout marks capitulation or the start of a deeper slide.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin (BTC) price drops 2.8% as index declines
items.summary: All twenty constituents in the CoinDesk 20 index were trading lower since yesterday.

items.title: U.S. job growth blows past forecasts, setting stage for Fed rate hikes
items.summary: Bitcoin is now facing another headwind — the prospect of higher interest rates.

items.title: Bearish zcash bets hit record high as privacy token's price crashes
items.summary: Liquidations were small relative to the size of the decline, pointing to spot selling rather than a leverage cascade, while open interest in ZEC futures climbed to a record high in token terms as traders crowded into the slide from the short side.

items.title: Live updates: bitcoin tumbles to $60,000 as blowout jobs data, Zcash bug keeps pressure on crypto
items.summary: Zcash plummeted 40% after Shielded Labs revealed a major bug that went undetected for 4 years.

items.title: Arthur Hayes dumps zcash holdings after Orchard Pool vulnerability revealed
items.summary: Hayes said he would reconsider his stance if his assumptions that an exploit is still possible prove to be incorrect.

items.title: Bitcoin sentiment hit peak bearishness at recent lows, peak bullishness near tops
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 5, 2026

items.title: Crypto's worst week since July 2024 deepens as bitcoin, ether near critical price levels
items.summary: Crypto is on course for its worst week since July 2024, with the ether price approaching a critical support as a zcash exploit and AI capital rotation pile on the pressure.

items.title: JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citi to start blockchain offensive with shared tokenized network
items.summary: American's biggest banks plan to introduce a shared tokenized network next year to tackle the potential threat of stablecoins eating into their deposits.
